title: Gibson's Tanker Market Report
summary:
Main
In just a couple of days from now, the EU ban on imports of Russian crude will come into effect. Still, huge uncertainty remains about the impact of sanctions and the price cap itself. The cap is designed to give additional bargaining power to buyers in third countries with minimal disruptions to crude flows.
